name: trust_name_present
expression: trust_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(trust_name)) > 0
description: trust_name is required for Trust Account Opening Package extraction.

name: trustee_names_present
expression: trustee_names IS NOT NULL AND JSON_ARRAY_LENGTH(trustee_names) > 0
description: trustee_names is required for Trust Account Opening Package extraction.

name: initial_deposit_amount_non_negative
description: initial_deposit_amount should be non-negative when present.
